messages: I made this for you... please don't let it go cold 🥺
You look like you need a boost—will you take a sip for me?
Don't let the steam disappear... I tried really hard to make it perfect
Just a little sip would make me feel so appreciated
Your cup's gone chilly... and so has my heart 😞
I kept it warm as long as I could... please drink it soon?
It's still warm... but not for much longer. I promise it's good!
You deserve a cozy moment—let me give it to you
You've been away for so long... do you still want it?
I made it just how you like it... please try it before it cools
If you don't want it, that's okay... but I'll be a little sad
Life's too short for cold coffee—and I wanted this to be special
Take a little break—your coffee's waiting so patiently for you
You didn't forget about your coffee... right? 🥺
